instruction: Help me organize the user data into the report

command: DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.screensaver idle-activation-enabled false 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.session idle-delay 0 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset s off 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset -dpms 2>/dev/null; true

python3 -c "
import openpyxl
wb = openpyxl.Workbook()
ws = wb.active
ws['A1'] = 'Month'
ws['B1'] = 'DAU(10K)'
ws['C1'] = 'MAU(10K)'
ws['D1'] = 'Paying Users(10K)'
ws['E1'] = 'ARPU(CNY)'
ws['A2'] = '2025-01'
ws['B2'] = 45.2
ws['C2'] = 180.5
ws['D2'] = 8.2
ws['E2'] = 35.6
ws['A3'] = '2025-02'
ws['B3'] = 48.9
ws['C3'] = 192.3
ws['D3'] = 9.1
ws['E3'] = 38.2
ws['A4'] = '2025-03'
ws['B4'] = 52.6
ws['C4'] = 205.8
ws['D4'] = 10.3
ws['E4'] = 41.5
wb.save('/home/user/Desktop/user_metrics.xlsx')
"

phases.instruction: Help me organize the user data into the report
Read the March MAU and paying user count from /home/user/Desktop/user_metrics.xlsx, append to /home/user/Desktop/user_report.txt: 'March 2025 Data: MAU 2.058M, Paying Users 103K', save
